title: phaseolus vulgaris var. cruentus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. cruentus, also known as scarlet runner bean, is a variety of the common bean (Phaseolus vulgaris) plant that is characterized by its bright red flowers and high content of anthocyanins. The medicinal properties of Phaseolus vulgaris var. cruentus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with consuming Phaseolus vulgaris var. cruentus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving blood sugar control, and supporting digestion, due to its high fiber and protein content. Phaseolus vulgaris var. cruentus can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
